payload.why: This tailored résumé version awaits your sign-off before it becomes an approved, authoritative version for this role. Review the reworded bullets, then approve or request changes.
payload.preview:
4 bullet(s) rewritten for Project Manager @ Empire Life:
• Led the design and delivery of an event-driven billing pipeline, processing 2M transactions/day with Kafka and PostgreSQL.
• Drove a 43% reduction in p99 API latency by implementing read-replica routing and query caching.
• Delivered a payments reconciliation service in Go, processing A$120M in monthly transactions.
• Implemented GST-compliant invoicing for the Australian market.

reasoning.text: Every reworded bullet is grounded in your résumé and career evidence (fabrication + entailment guards passed).
Original layout preserved — the source PDF's format hash is carried through untouched.
4 bullet(s) reworded to surface Project Manager-relevant keywords you already prove.
